conflicts.label: Iran 2026 (Day 60)
conflicts.note: Operation Epic Fury — Day 60. Three U.S. CSGs in CENTCOM (Lincoln/Ford/Bush) holds — first time since Operation Iraqi Freedom in 2003; combined >200 aircraft, 15,000 sailors/Marines, ~14 DDGs/LCS. Iran ceasefire INDEFINITE (Trump Apr 21) — holding day 18. Diplomatic track in deadlock: Iran transmitted written proposal via Pakistani mediators offering Hormuz reopening + ceasefire extension in exchange for U.S. lifting naval blockade, with nuclear DEFERRED — Trump 'doesn't love the proposal' (Reuters/WaPo Apr 27); Sec. Rubio (Fox): unacceptable to 'normalize a system in which the Iranians decide who gets to use an international waterway.' Lebanon ceasefire (Apr 16) under strain — IDF expanded into Bekaa Valley Apr 27 (>20 Hezbollah-linked sites; first such expansion since the truce). Houthi Red Sea track REACTIVATED — MV Andromeda Star Apr 26 (3 ASBMs). U.S. blockade redirects 34 vessels cumulative. NYT (Apr 24) munitions: >1,200 Patriots, ~1,100 stealth cruise, >1,000 Tomahawks (~10× annual procurement). Brent broke above $111/bbl Apr 28 (intraday $110.85, high $111.57); WTI $99.40; AAA gas $4.022. S&P 500 record close 7,173.91 Apr 27 / Nasdaq record 24,887.10. Iran MoH 3,375 killed (Foundation of Martyrs separately 3,468); Lebanese MoPH 2,509 killed / 7,755+ wounded. ~3.2M Iran IDPs + 1M+ Lebanese displaced. 6 months estimated to clear Hormuz mines post-hostilities (Pentagon to House Armed Services Apr 22). Cumulative U.S. cost midpoint ~$51.85B (range $25B-$95B). 60-day War Powers Resolution statutory deadline May 1 (T-3); no scheduled floor vote on Massie/Khanna H.Con.Res.38 (94 cosponsors) or Kaine companion in window.

conflicts.label: Iraq 2003 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Iraqi Freedom — "shock and awe" + ground invasion. 300,000 troops deployed.

conflicts.label: Libya 2011 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Odyssey Dawn / Unified Protector — NATO no-fly zone. Limited US role.

conflicts.label: Gulf 1991 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Desert Storm — 38-day air campaign + 100-hour ground war. 700,000 coalition troops.

sources: CRS Reports R44116 (Iraq), RL33110 (Gulf War), R41725 (Libya). Costs inflation-adjusted to 2026 dollars using BLS CPI-U.
